overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a medieval woodworker using a drawknife on a large log in a rustic village at dusk. The camera performs a slow 360-degree orbit around the character, revealing timber-framed houses, wooden palisades, and village details.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village square with timber-framed buildings

agents.ego_description: slowly circling around the woodworker to observe the craftsmanship from different angles

notable_agents.action: woodworker wearing red cap and brown tunic using a drawknife to smooth a large log supported on sawhorses

entered.detail: two-story medieval house with dark timber beams and thatched roof
tall wooden stake fence enclosing the village area
wooden A-frame supports holding the large log
thick tree trunk being worked by the woodworker

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a medieval village square at dusk, with a woodworker smoothing a large log on sawhorses. A timber-framed house stands prominently on the left while a wooden palisade fence lines the right side of the muddy clearing.

scene_state.functional_zone: village work area with cart and timber stacks

events.description: background villager in yellow clothing enters from left and walks across the scene behind the woodworker

agents.ego_description: continuing the circular path around the woodworker, revealing the cart and stone wall in the background

notable_agents.action: woodworker rotating the log and continuing to smooth the surface with steady drawknife strokes
villager in yellow tunic walking across the background from left to right

entered.detail: large wooden wagon with spoked wheels parked near timber stacks
weathered stone retaining wall with wooden scaffolding above

segments.scene_description: As the camera circles to the back-right of the woodworker, a wooden cart comes into view on the left and a stone wall appears on the right. A distant villager walks across the background while the woodworker continues shaping the log.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village square returning to starting view

events.description: camera completes the 360-degree orbit and returns to the original viewing angle

agents.ego_description: completing the circular path around the woodworker and returning to the front-facing position

notable_agents.action: woodworker continuing to work on the log with consistent drawknife strokes

entered.detail: tall wooden stake fence returning to view on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its orbit around the woodworker, returning to the original viewpoint. The timber-framed house regains prominence on the left, the wooden fence reappears on the right, and the cart and stone wall exit the frame as the dusk-lit village scene comes full circle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous 360-degree orbit around a medieval woodworker, beginning and ending in a rustic village square at dusk. It begins with the woodworker smoothing a large log on sawhorses, framed by a timber-framed house on the left and a wooden palisade fence on the right. As the camera circles toward the back-right of the figure, the perspective shifts to reveal a wooden cart on the left and a stone wall on the right, while a distant villager crosses the background. The scene then completes its rotation, causing the cart and stone wall to exit the frame as the original landmarks return to view. Finally, the camera returns to its starting position, bringing the timber-framed house and wooden fence back into prominence to close the circle.
